zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield於1514年1月1日出生在英國貝德福爾巴福德時，她的父親William Glover Cranfield Sr.31歲，母親Katherine Dale Odell27歲。她於1540年與William H. Carter Sr在英國英格蘭貝德福爾巴福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1570年1月26日在英國貝德福爾肯普斯頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾肯普斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield于1514年1月1日出生在英国貝德福爾巴福德时，她的父亲William Glover Cranfield Sr.31岁，母亲Katherine Dale Odell27岁。她于1540年与William H. Carter Sr在英国英格兰貝德福爾巴福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1570年1月26日在英国貝德福爾肯普斯頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾肯普斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Cranfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Bedfordshire named Cranfield, from Old English cran(uc) ‘crane’ + feld ‘open country’.

variants.name: Cranfill
meanings: English: probably a local (Cambridgeshire) variant of   Cranfield  . It is apparently no longer found in Britain. In the US, it is found mainly in NC, TX, and IN.

variants.name: Cornfield
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cranfield  .
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish or German   Kornfeld  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield was born on 1 January 1514, in Barford, Bedfordshire, England, her father, William Glover Cranfield Sr., was 31 and her mother, Katherine Dale Odell, was 27. She married William H. Carter Sr in 1540, in Barford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 26 January 1570, in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield est née le 1 janvier 1514, à Barford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Glover Cranfield Sr., avait 31 ans et sa mère, Katherine Dale Odell, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William H. Carter Sr en 1540, à Barford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 janvier 1570, à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield am 1. Januar 1514 in Barford, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Glover Cranfield Sr. 31 und ihre Mutter Katherine Dale Odell 27. Sie hat 1540 in Barford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom William H. Carter Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Januar 1570 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield è nata il il 1 gennaio 1514 nel Barford, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, William Glover Cranfield Sr., aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Katherine Dale Odell, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William H. Carter Sr nel 1540, nel Barford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 26 gennaio 1570, nel Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Kempston, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Catherine Cranfieldが1514年1月1日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアバーフォードで生まれた時，父William Glover Cranfield Sr.は31歳，母Katherine Dale Odellは27歳であった。1540年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアバーフォードでWilliam H. Carter Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1570年1月26日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンで56歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield(이)가 1514년 1월 1일 영국 베드퍼드실르 바퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Glover Cranfield Sr.(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Dale Odell(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 바퍼드에서 William H. Carter Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1570년 1월 26일 영국 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.1 January 1514–26 January 1570: 1 de janeiro de 1514–26 de janeiro de 1570
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1514, em Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Glover Cranfield Sr., tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Dale Odell, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William H. Carter Sr em 1540, em Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1570, em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield родилась 1 января 1514 г. в местности барфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Glover Cranfield Sr. было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Dale Odell, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William H. Carter Sr в 1540 г. в местности барфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 26 января 1570 г. в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.1 January 1514–26 January 1570: 1 de enero de 1514–26 de enero de 1570
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield nació el 1 de enero de 1514, en Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Glover Cranfield Sr., tenía 31 años y su mamá, Katherine Dale Odell, tenía 27 años. Se casó con William H. Carter Sr en 1540, en Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 26 de enero de 1570, en Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
